title: Purfle Agent Identity
description: Cryptographic identity block embedded in an agent manifest. Used standalone by signing tooling. The signature field is absent at authoring time and populated by the SDK on publish.

key_id.description: Identifier of the signing key registered in the Purfle key registry.

algorithm.description: JWA algorithm identifier. ES256 is the only supported value in v0.1.

issued_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the manifest was signed.

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp after which the manifest is invalid.

signature.description: JWS Compact Serialization of the canonical manifest body. The payload is the canonical JSON of the manifest with this field omitted. Absent at authoring time.
